nav.looking_for_sleep: Looking for a place to sleep?

hero.title: The art of
hero.subtitle: Premium Rural Disconnection
hero.desc: Total rural disconnection in the heart of the Matarraña. Pure nature, comfort perfected to the last detail.

intro.label: The Little Corner
intro.title: A retreat where time stands still
intro.text: In the heart of Fuentespalda, we've created a space where modernity and tradition merge to offer you an unforgettable stay.

featured.title: Our Apartments
featured.subtitle: Rest and Nature
featured.not_available_desc: The space you are looking for is not currently available.
featured.booking_whatsapp_note: Upon booking, you will receive your access codes immediately via WhatsApp and Email.
featured.coming_soon_desc: This space is in the final stages in Valjunquera. Bookings are not yet open to the public.

price.note: Approximate price, may vary by dates

contact.title: Contact
contact.header_title: Let's talk about your next disconnection.
contact.header_desc: We are here to help you design the perfect stay. Email us, call us or visit us in the heart of Matarraña.
contact.tagline: A place to find oneself, a place to return.
contact.rentikNote: Need immediate help? Chat with us through RentikPro.

footer.desc: Your premium retreat in Matarraña. Pure rural life with cutting-edge technology.

experiences.label: Explore the surroundings
experiences.desc: We have carefully selected the best of Matarraña. From crystal clear waters to starry skies, discover the soul of our land.
experiences.cta_ready_desc: Book your stay and let us guide you through the most magical corners of Teruel.
experiences.location_note: We will provide the exact location after your booking.

guides.label: Logbook
guides.desc: Stories, routes and practical advice written by those of us who inhabit this land.
guides.prefer_action_desc: Discover our selection of direct experiences: from oil tasting to hidden trails.

coming_soon.project_desc: Two twin shelters designed to merge with the olive tree landscape. Absolute silence, pure air and the luxury of total disconnection.
coming_soon.waitlist_desc: Demand for this project is high. Join the list to receive early access 48h before the official opening of bookings.
coming_soon.no_spam_note: Only for dreamers. We don't spam.
coming_soon.success_desc: We have successfully registered you. You will be among the first to sleep under the Valjunquera sky.
coming_soon.location_coords: Polygon 12, Plot 10 — Where silence has a name.

rentik.hero_desc: At El Rinconcito Matarraña, we believe that the best technology is the one you don't see, but you feel. We use RentikPro to ensure your stay is seamless, secure and worry-free.
rentik.benefits_title: What does it mean for you?
rentik.benefits_desc: RentikPro's efficiency directly translates into benefits for your rural stay.
rentik.inbox_note: We respond in less than 5 minutes thanks to centralization.
rentik.frictionless_desc: Forget about searching for emails or messages in different apps. With RentikPro's unified inbox, your entire stay is centralized.
rentik.owner_desc: Discover how RentikPro can transform the management of your tourist accommodations, just as it does with El Rinconcito Matarraña.

features.calendar_desc: Instant synchronization with all platforms. No overbookings, no waits.
features.inbox_desc: All communication in one place. We answer your questions instantly.
features.bot_desc: 24/7 Assistance. Automatic answers so you never have doubts.
features.checkin_desc: Autonomous access to your apartment without the need for physical keys.

chat.title: Assistant
chat.form_desc: Leave us your details and we will respond personally.
chat.success_desc: We have sent your inquiry to the team. We will contact you soon.
chat.welcome: Hi 👋 I'm the El Rinconcito assistant. Can I help with availability, activities or questions?

eclipse.desc: The first total solar eclipse visible in Spain in over 100 years. Fuentespalda and the Matarraña are in the perfect totality band: 1 minute 27 seconds of absolute darkness. Same night: peak of the Perseids meteor shower.
eclipse.bonus_text: ✨ Same night: peak of the Perseids. Total eclipse + meteor shower. Once in a lifetime.
eclipse.seo_title: Total Solar Eclipse 2026 in Matarraña — El Rinconcito
eclipse.seo_desc: The first total solar eclipse in Spain in over 100 years. 12 August 2026 · 1m 27s totality · Matarraña, Teruel.

premium.label: Signature Experiences
premium.subtitle: Michelin Star restaurant 400m away. The most epic greenway in Aragón. Starlight skies. And an eclipse not seen in 100 years.
premium.eclipse_desc: 1m 27s of total darkness. The first eclipse in Spain in 100 years. Matarraña in the perfect band.
premium.gastro_desc: La Torre del Visco: Michelin Star 400m away. La Fábrica de Solfa, Baudilio: Repsol Suns 2026.
premium.vv_desc: Former railway turned into an epic route. Viaducts over the Algars river. From Matarraña to the Ebro Delta.
premium.astro_desc: Milky Way visible to the naked eye. Zero light pollution. Perseids, Geminids, meteor showers.

agua.title: Crystal clear waters
agua.desc: The pools of the Matarraña and Algars rivers are rated excellent quality by MITECO. Karstic waters from the Puertos de Beceite — National Geographic chose them among the best in Spain.

aire.title: Certified pure air
aire.desc: Fuentespalda is in a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve. No industry within 50km. Clean winds from the Mediterranean. The ancient pine forests of the Puertos naturally purify the air. At 740m altitude.

home.contact_desc: Toni and Evelyn respond personally. No bots, no forms. Tell us what you are looking for and we will organise it together.

viasverdes.seo_title: Via Verde Val de Zafan — Spains Most Beautiful Greenway | El Rinconcito
viasverdes.seo_desc: The Via Verde Val de Zafan runs through Matarraña: 135 km, viaducts, tunnels and swimming holes. Perfect base in Fuentespalda.

gastronomia.seo_title: Fine Dining in Matarraña | Michelin Star & Repsol Suns
gastronomia.seo_desc: Torre del Visco (Michelin Star + Green Star), Repsol Suns in Beceite and Valderrobres. Black truffle, DOP olive oil.

astroturismo.seo_title: Astrotourism in Matarraña — Starlight Skies | El Rinconcito
astroturismo.seo_desc: Milky Way from your window, zero light pollution, Perseids and Geminids. UNESCO Biosphere Reserve in Teruel.

rentikpro.seo_desc: Check availability and book the apartments at El Rinconcito in Fuentespalda. Los Almendros, La Ermita, La Tirolina.

demo.banner: Demo mode — sample availability. Connect RentikPro for real data.

rentikpro_page.use_case_note: El Rinconcito uses RentikPro. This website is its use case.
rentikpro_page.features_title: What RentikPro does for this property
rentikpro_page.hero_badge: Real case — El Rinconcito Matarraña uses RentikPro
rentikpro_page.hero_desc: RentikPro is the management system that connects this website calendar with Booking and Airbnb, unifies guest communication and automates check-in.
rentikpro_page.seo_desc: El Rinconcito uses RentikPro for calendar sync, unified inbox and digital check-in. Discover how it can help you too.
rentikpro_page.feat_cal_desc: The calendar on this website is synced with RentikPro. Data is exact at this moment, no manual updates.
rentikpro_page.feat_inbox_desc: WhatsApp, email, Booking.com and Airbnb in one thread. We never miss a message. We respond in minutes.
rentikpro_page.feat_bot_desc: The chatbot on this site responds with real apartment, activity and availability data. Trained on our content.
rentikpro_page.feat_checkin_desc: Guests receive automatic instructions before arrival. Code access, no keys, no waiting.
rentikpro_page.benefit_0: Sync with Booking, Airbnb, Vrbo and direct channels
rentikpro_page.benefit_1: Unified dashboard: prices, blocks and availability
rentikpro_page.benefit_4: Support for rural lodges, apartments and houses
rentikpro_page.tech_1: Smart per-month cache for maximum speed
rentikpro_page.tech_2: Transparent CORS and token error handling
rentikpro_page.tech_3: Ready for direct booking when you are
rentikpro_page.owner_card_0_desc: Booking, Airbnb, Vrbo and direct in one place.
rentikpro_page.owner_card_1_desc: Calendars update themselves. No manual work.
rentikpro_page.owner_card_2_desc: 1 apartment or 20. The system scales with you.
rentikpro_page.owner_card_3_desc: The RentikPro team sets everything up for you.
